features.title: Align KEPLAR runtime contract with Node 25
features.description: Move the Node runtime pin, package engines, and active developer documentation to Node 25.2.1, then verify the existing application toolchain under that runtime.
acceptance_criteria: Root and Web package engines accept >=25.0.0 <26.0.0.
README and the dependency codemap describe Node 25.2.1.
Frozen-lockfile install has no KEPLAR unsupported-engine warning.
pnpm check, pnpm smoke, and pnpm e2e are executed under Node 25 with truthful evidence recorded.
test_needs: Typecheck, lint, unit test, build, and format aggregate
definition_of_done: Required tests pass or have a documented unavailable or failing exception with risk
Required verification matrix items pass or have documented exceptions
